12 st 2 lb Position Right wing Shot Left Played for Detroit Falcons Detroit Cougars Montreal Maroons Playing career 1917 1934 Harold Henry Hicks December 10, 1900 August 14, 1965 was a Canadian professional ice hockey player who played 90 games in the National Hockey League with the Montreal Maroons , Detroit Cougars , and Detroit Falcons between 1928 and 1931. The rest of his career, which lasted between 1917 and 1934, was spent in various minor leagues. He was born in Sillery , Quebec .
